attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT      
  MDSPD.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT AS REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY ,  
  MDSPD.PROCESS_DATE AS PROCESS_DATE ,  
  'SLS_ADJ' AS REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,   
  MDSPD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME  
  FROM    
  $$NRTNCRVWDB.MT_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_DEL MDSPD  
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT SALES_ADJ
	ON MDSPD.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT = SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT
	AND SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_TYPE_CODE <> 'POS'
	AND MDSPD.IDE_IFC_ADJ_REPORTING_TYPE_CD <>'M'
  WHERE MDSPD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES   WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_MT_RSTD_INV_REV_MEASURE' AND TABLE_NAME='MT_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_DEL')
  UNION ALL
  SELECT      
  MDSPD.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT AS REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY ,  
  MDSPD.PROCESS_DATE AS PROCESS_DATE ,  
  'SLS_ADJ' AS REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,   
  MDSPD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME  
  FROM    
  $$NRTNCRVWDB.MT_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_DEL MDSPD
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT SALES_ADJ
	ON  MDSPD.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT = SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT
	AND SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_TYPE_CODE = 'POS'
	AND SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE<>'POS-OA'
  WHERE MDSPD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES   WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_MT_RSTD_INV_REV_MEASURE' AND TABLE_NAME='MT_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_DEL')
  UNION ALL
SELECT 
MDSPD.ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY AS REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY, 
MDSPD.PROCESS_DT AS PROCESS_DATE,
'POS' AS REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
MDSPD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.MT_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DTLS_DEL MDSPD
WHERE MDSPD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_MT_RSTD_INV_REV_MEASURE' AND TABLE_NAME='MT_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DTLS_DEL')

SELECT
 WRIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
 WRIRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 WRIRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 WRIRM.PRODUCT_KEY,
 WRIRM.AR_TRX_KEY,
 WRIRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 WRIRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
 WRIRM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WRIRM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WRIRM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WRIRM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WRIRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 WRIRM.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
 WRIRM.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 WRIRM.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 WRIRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 WRIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
 WRIRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
 WRIRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 WRIRM.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
 WRIRM.DD_GL_DATETIME,
 WRIRM.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
 WRIRM.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
 WRIRM.DV_FISCAL_DT,
 WRIRM.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
 WRIRM.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD,
 WRIRM.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
 WRIRM.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
 WRIRM.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
 WRIRM.AR_TRX_DATETIME,
 WRIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
 WRIRM.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
 WRIRM.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
 WRIRM.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
 WRIRM.DV_CHARGES_FLG,
 WRIRM.DV_MISC_FLG,
 WRIRM.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
 WRIRM.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 WRIRM.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 WRIRM.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
 WRIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 WRIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 WRIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRC_AMT,
 WRIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
 WRIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
 WRIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
 WRIRM.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
 WRIRM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
 WRIRM.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 WRIRM.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
 WRIRM.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME ,
 WRIRM.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
 WRIRM.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,
 WRIRM.GL_DT,
 WRIRM.BK_SS_CD,
 WRIRM.DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
 WRIRM.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
 WRIRM.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
 WRIRM.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
 WRIRM.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
 WRIRM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
 WRIRM.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
 WRIRM.TRANSACTION_DT,
 WRIRM.GL_POSTED_DTM,
 WRIRM.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
 WRIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 WRIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT,
 WRIRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT,
 WRIRM.SPLIT_PCT,
 WRIRM.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
 WRIRM.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
 WRIRM.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG, 
 WRIRM.DV_RESTATED_OR_ACTUAL_FLG ,
 'N' AS RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG ,
 (CASE WHEN (WRIRM.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY = -999) THEN Random (1000000, 1001800)*-1 ELSE WRIRM.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY END) REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,   /* Performance changes, as part of APR- FY17 CDR */ 
 WRIRM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
 WRIRM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
 WRIRM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 WRIRM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD ,
 WRIRM.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID,
 WRIRM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD /*PRBOBBA: ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY15*/,
 WRIRM.DV_FMV_FLG , /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY15*/
 WRIRM.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD, /* Added as a  part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
 WRIRM.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT, /* Added as a  part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
 WRIRM.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT, /* Added as a  part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
 WRIRM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,                  /* goponnus : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
  /* goponnus : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
  (CASE WHEN (WRIRM.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = -999) THEN Random (1000000, 1001800)*-1 ELSE WRIRM.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY END) XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
 /* Performance changes, as part of APR- FY17 CDR */
WRIRM.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME,     /* pneelraj : Added as part of Q1FY16 ICPM */ 
/*PRMADDAL: Added below 4 columns as part of Q3FY17 RO SCOPE*/
 WRIRM.XCAT_FLG,
 WRIRM.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
 WRIRM.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
 WRIRM.ELA_FLG,
   CASE WHEN WRIRM.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY=-999 THEN Random(1000000,1001800)*-1 
 ELSE WRIRM.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY END ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY /* Column added as part of Q4FY17 CSPP VIP Proj*/
 ,WRIRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT /*Column added as part of Q1FY18 SOT OA*/
,WRIRM.POB_TYPE_CD
 ,WRIRM.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
 ,WRIRM.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD /* Added as part of RO Sep 10th release*/
 ,WRIRM.DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG
  /*Added as part of Accruals Q2FY19*/
 ,WRIRM.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD
 ,WRIRM.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY 
,WRIRM.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY /*Added as part of MERAKI Q2FY19*/ 
,WRIRM.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /* ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY20 ICPM ACCOUNTING_RULE */
,WRIRM.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,WRIRM.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
,WRIRM.DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
/* Added as part of SFP Rel */
,WRIRM.DV_AS_INV_POS_SC_IND
,WRIRM.DV_LAST_RECORD_FLG
,WRIRM.NET_PRICE_FLG
,WRIRM.CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG
,WRIRM.ACT_REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
,WRIRM.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
,WRIRM.BUNDLE_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
,WRIRM.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
,WRIRM.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
,WRIRM.DV_BNI_FHI_TYPE_CODE /* ADDED AS A PART OF PPMT SCOPE FOR EDW_FY23Finance_APR_Release  */
,WRIRM.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
 FROM  $$WORKDB.W_RSTD_INV_REV_MEASURE  WRIRM
 WHERE WRIRM.ACTION_CODE IN ('I', 'R' )
  AND WRIRM.DML_TYPE  IN ('I', 'R' )

SELECT
 EL_KEY.MIN_INV_REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY - ROW_NUMBER () OVER (ORDER BY WI.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY, WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD, WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT_NEW, 
 WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,WI.SALES_REP_NUMBER) AS REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
 WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 WI.PRODUCT_KEY,
 WI.AR_TRX_KEY,
 WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 WI.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
 WI.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WI.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WI.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WI.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 WI.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
 WI.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 WI.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
 WI.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
 WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT_NEW AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 WI.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
 WI.DD_GL_DATETIME,
 WI.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
 WI.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
 WI.DV_FISCAL_DT_NEW AS DV_FISCAL_DT,
 WI.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
 WI.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD,
 WI.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
 WI.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
 WI.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
 WI.AR_TRX_DATETIME,
 WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
 WI.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
 WI.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
 WI.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
 WI.DV_CHARGES_FLG,
 WI.DV_MISC_FLG,
 WI.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
 WI.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 WI.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 WI.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
 WI.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 WI.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 WI.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRC_AMT,
 WI.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
 WI.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
 WI.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
 WI.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
 WI.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
 WI.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 WI.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
 WI.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
 CURRENT_USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME ,
 CURRENT_USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)   AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
 WI.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
 WI.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,
 WI.GL_DT,
 WI.BK_SS_CD,
 WI.DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
 WI.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
 WI.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
 WI.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
 WI.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
 WI.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
 WI.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
 WI.TRANSACTION_DT,
 WI.GL_POSTED_DTM,
 WI.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
 WI.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 WI.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT,
 WI.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT,
 WI.SPLIT_PCT,
 WI.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
 WI.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
 WI.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG ,
 WI.DV_RESTATED_OR_ACTUAL_FLG ,
 WI.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG,
 WI.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY, 
 WI.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
 WI.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
 WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 WI.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID,
 WI.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,
 WI.DV_FMV_FLG,
 WI.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,    
 WI.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,   
 WI.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,  
 WI.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, 
 WI.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY ,
 WI.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME ,    
 WI.XCAT_FLG,
 WI.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
 WI.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
 WI.ELA_FLG,
 WI.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY
 ,WI.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT
 ,WI.POB_TYPE_CD  
 ,WI.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG 
 ,WI.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
 ,WI.DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG
 ,WI.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD
 ,WI.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
 ,WI.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY 
 ,WI.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME 
 ,WI.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
 ,WI.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 ,WI.DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT_NEW AS DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT 
 ,WI.DV_AS_INV_POS_SC_IND_NEW AS DV_AS_INV_POS_SC_IND
 ,WI.DV_LAST_RECORD_FLG
 ,WI.NET_PRICE_FLG
 ,WI.CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG
 ,WI.ACT_REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
 ,WI.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
 ,WI.BUNDLE_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
 ,WI.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
 ,WI.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
 ,WI.DV_BNI_FHI_TYPE_CODE /* ADDED AS A PART OF PPMT SCOPE FOR EDW_FY23Finance_APR_Release  */
 ,WI.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_INV_MSR_SFP_FWD_RVR WI
CROSS JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_RSTD_POS_SC_CTRL_SFP EL_KEY
